plugins.photosPermission: Allow Gym Tracker to access your photos to attach them to your exercises.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Gym Tracker to access your camera to take photos and record videos for your exercises.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Gym Tracker to access your microphone for video recording.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Gym Tracker needs camera access to let you take photos and record videos of your exercises.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Gym Tracker needs microphone access for video recording.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Gym Tracker needs photo library access to let you attach images to your exercises.
